title: digitaria setigera var. calliblepharata
intro: Digitaria setigera var. calliblepharata, also known as finger grass or Digitaria, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Digitaria has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Digitaria include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and exhibit antioxidant properties. Digitaria is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal remedies for various health conditions.
